content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges provided, we can scan each edge and collect the time t whenever node u and node v match the two queried nodes (in either order).

First, we will find the earliest time t when node 0 and node 2 are connected. We can do this by scanning the edges from node 0 to all other nodes and from all other nodes to node 2. The earliest time t we find is 1, so the answer is 1.

Next, we will find the earliest time t when node 9 and node 8 are connected. We can do this by scanning the edges from node 9 to all other nodes and from all other nodes to node 8. The earliest time t we find is 24, so the answer is 24.

Therefore, the answer to the question is 24.
